pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 86-87 creates course with shortname='CHEM201'; README.md line 6 confirms 'Course: CHEM201'

README.md line 31 states 'Weighted mean of grades, aggregation code 10'; verifier.py lines 92-95 document that code 10 = Weighted mean of grades (the correct target state); setup_task.sh line 122 confirms 0=Mean is the broken initial state
README.md line 32 'Problem Sets' worth 30%; lines 57-58 confirm 'Problem Sets = 30' in Actions Required section; verifier.py line 60 confirms expected weight is 30
README.md line 33 'Lab Reports' worth 30%; lines 59 confirm 'Lab Reports = 30' in Actions Required section; verifier.py line 61 confirms expected weight is 30
README.md line 34 'Exams' worth 40%; line 60 confirms 'Exams = 40' in Actions Required section; verifier.py line 62 confirms expected weight is 40
README.md line 39 'Midterm Exam (weight: 40 within Exams)'; line 62 confirms 'Midterm Exam = 40 (within Exams)'; verifier.py line 245 confirms expected subweight is 40
README.md line 40 'Final Exam (weight: 60 within Exams)'; line 62 confirms 'Final Exam = 60 (within Exams)'; verifier.py line 246 confirms expected subweight is 60

privileged_info_summary: The task repairs a Moodle 4.5 gradebook for CHEM201 (Organic Chemistry I). Initial state: 6 manual grade items (Problem Sets 1-2, Lab Reports 1-2, Midterm Exam, Final Exam) all at the top level with Mean of grades aggregation (code 0). Target state: three weighted sub-categories using Weighted mean of grades (code 10) at the top level. Problem Sets and Lab Reports each weigh 30%, Exams weighs 40%. Within Exams, Midterm Exam weighs 40% and Final Exam weighs 60%. All data is synthetically generated by setup scripts.
